_README: Copy this to kiln-secrets.staging.json or kiln-secrets.production.json and fill in real values. Populated files are gitignored. Feed to scripts/seed-secrets.sh via `npm run seed:staging` / `npm run seed:production`. Any value containing REPLACE_ME aborts the run. Optional secrets can be set to null to skip. The github-app-private-key value accepts an inline PEM OR `@file:/absolute/path/to/key.pem` to read from disk. The grafana-cloud/otlp-auth block's basic_auth is auto-computed from instance_id + api_token if you omit it.
